name: io.github.ejentum/ejentum-mcp
description: Reasoning, code, anti-deception, memory harness tools. Stdio (npx) or HTTPS (api.ejentum.com/mcp).

environmentVariables.name: EJENTUM_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Ejentum Logic API key. Get one at https://ejentum.com/pricing (free tier: 100 calls).

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token with EJENTUM_API_KEY. Get one at https://ejentum.com/pricing (free tier: 100 calls).
